title: nimblegate frame frontmatter
description: Schema for the YAML frontmatter block at the top of a nimblegate frame markdown file (.appframes/<category>/<name>.md). Validates required fields, enum values, and shape. Does not validate the markdown body after the closing `---` fence.

name.description: Short kebab-case identifier, unique within the frame's category. Example: 'no-force-push-main'. Combined with category to form the full ID 'git-safety/no-force-push-main'.

category.description: Frame category. Determines output ordering (most-destructive first) and is part of the frame ID. Picks one of seven fixed values.

severity.description: How a failure is enforced. BLOCK fails the trigger (exit 1); WARN reports but lets the action proceed (exit 0); INFO is logged only.

triggers.description: Which trigger surfaces fire this frame. The engine indexes frames by trigger and only runs the matching subset for each action.

applies-to.description: Optional targeting hints. The engine reads this for documentation purposes; the check function is free to ignore or override.

files.description: Glob patterns of files this frame examines. Used by file-scanning checks (e.g. security/no-innerHTML-user-input).

commands.description: Command prefixes this frame examines. Used by command-intercept checks via the git-wrap trigger.

canonical-refs.description: Names of TOML files under .appframes/_canonical/ that this frame's check function reads. Documents the data dependency so tooling can detect missing tables.
